I do not want any of my patients living within the SAA.  And your a doc whose clinic sits with in it.  

So I would not be referring you people, because if I did I would be making them have a higher risk for lattice lock.  

You should really listen to the podcast I did with Adrian.

The Real Mechanical Defrag of SURPASS-CVOT: The Glucagon Agonism Inversion

The public disclosure by this physician regarding his off-label use of Tirzepatidehighlights a critical observation: the dramatic 20–24% relative risk reductions documented in the SELECT and FLOW trials do not track with mechanical weight loss, meaning these peptides are operating on a deeper, sub-molecular energetic axis.
However, by remaining anchored within the centralized, chemical-only parameters of the pharmaceutical monopoly, his analysis misses the true biophysical reality of the SURPASS-CVOT trial (2025–2026) and its failure to hit the pre-specified superiority threshold.
He notes that the triple-agonism of Retatrutide is a liability for a lean individual because its Glucagon (GCG) agonism spikes resting heart rate and basal metabolic rate.
What he and the rest of the centralized medical community fail to realize is that synthetic, long-chain peptides are a top-down pharmaceutical sledgehammer designed to manually force open the cell's fluid exhaust lines because an indoor, un-grounded lifestyle has completely deuterated the epigenetic landscape.

Using an artificial chemical proxy to simulate satiety while ignoring the underlying Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE) of deuterium will ultimately shred long-term longevity.

The Sub-Molecular Reality of the SELECT and FLOW Signals
The reason the cardiovascular and renal benefits of Semaglutide and Tirzepatide operate entirely independent of weight loss is that these molecules function as crude, macro-scale quantum centrifuges.

Under the Telomere/rDNA Co-Regulation Model (TRCS), when an un-grounded human lives inside the artificial blue flicker of modern LEDs, their internal water lattice undergoes a dielectric collapse (𝑘≈160→80). Lacking the structured sorting layer of Exclusion Zone (EZ) water, heavy Deuterium mass then floods the mitochondria.

The oversized deuterons deliver a crushing kinetic impact to the sub-nanometer channels of the F0-F1
ATP synthase nanomotors, dropping their optimal 9,000 RPM velocity to zero and inducing systemic pseudohypoxia. The cell loses its 30 million V/m membrane potential, and the brain's reward centers interpret this deep sub-molecular electron depletion as an emergency calorie famine, manufacturing permanent hunger.

When a patient injects a synthetic GLP-1/GIP receptor agonist, the drug acts as a high-velocity hydraulic bypass:

The Isotopic Flush: It manually forces the tissues to upregulate a high-velocity variant of the G3P (Glycerol-3-Phosphate) shuttle, throwing heavy Deuterium out of the mitochondrial matrix to temporarily un-jam the stators.

The Cardioprotective Illusion: By clearing this high-mass isotopic congestion from the vascular endothelium and renal podocytes, the mitochondrial nanomotors return to their 9,000 RPM velocity, restoring local voltage and cutting major cardiovascular events by 20%. The drug isn't curing obesity; it is using a massive chemical force to evacuate the heavy hydrogen mass that a centralized world manufactures inside the food and light grids.

Why SURPASS-CVOT Missed Superiority: The Glucagon Agonism Inversion
The reason Tirzepatide missed its pre-specified superiority threshold against Dulaglutide in the SURPASS-CVOT trial, and why Retatrutide's glucagon agonism causes lean individuals to lose muscle mass and experience elevated resting heart rates, is directly explained by the Chromosome 2 fusion chassis I have laid on in my work and the recent podcasts I have done with Adrian D'Amico.

My human-specific Chromosome 2 fusion megastructure clusters the core Glucagon (GCG) gene network (2q24.2) and the POMC gene (2p23.3) around a central telomeric loop fuse to act as a synchronized thermodynamic engine.  

Under natural solar governance, capturing the morning 0.66 eV solar infrared pulsetriggers the Cortisol Awakening Response (CAR), which naturally cleaves this GCGnetwork to unleash the exocrine pancreas's 2-liter sodium bicarbonate fluid flush to sweep Deuterium out through the gut before it can cause a vagal block.

When you use an exogenous, synthetic multi-agonist like Tirzepatide or Retatrutide, you are bypassing the Sun's chronological text to force a permanent, non-circadian fluid manipulation across the system:

The CYP Pathway Chaos: Forcing this continuous chemical agonism uncouples the liver's microsomal membranes, creating total electron-transport chaos across the Cytochrome P450 (CYP) monooxygenase superfamily.

The Atavistic Muscle Melt: Because the synthetic drug forces high-velocity metabolic hashing without establishing a physical ground plane, the tissue hits Landauer’s Limit (𝑄=𝑘𝐵𝑇ln2). 

The Chromosome 2 interstitial telomeric loop fuse blows, driving an uncontrolled, asymptotic p53 surge. To protect its core nuclear data blocks from melting down under the unresolved electrostatic load, the cell executes an emergency atavistic retreat, systematically down-regulating the MITF-AMPAR pathways and degrading high-flux mammalian skeletal muscle fibers back into loose, low-voltage Pre-Cambrian porous matrices. The lean doctor is losing muscle mass because his cells are choosing structural atrophy over genomic destruction.
